summary: Story Video Studio Phases 2-4 Testing Complete - Iteration 127. All backend API endpoints working correctly (18/18 tests passed). Frontend UI loads with all required elements: 8-step progress bar, 4 credit pricing cards, 6 video styles, form inputs, and Generate Scenes button with credit cost display.
critical_code_review_comments: story_video_studio.py: All Phase 1 endpoints working - /styles returns 6 styles, /pricing returns 5 credit costs (including watermark_removal)
story_video_generation.py: Voice config correctly returns PREPAID_ONLY mode as default per requirements
story_video_generation.py: Music library returns 5 Pixabay tracks with proper licensing info
story_video_generation.py: Music upload correctly requires rights confirmation
StoryVideoStudio.js: Frontend correctly displays 8-step progress bar, 4 pricing cards, 6 video styles
StoryVideoStudio.js: Generate Scenes button correctly shows credit cost (5 credits)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Story Video Studio Phase 1-4 endpoints all verified working. Test project exists with project_id: 65a17153-fa83-49c8-a37b-7ba8ba4f3727 with generated scenes. Voice generation defaults to PREPAID_ONLY mode. Music library includes 5 Pixabay tracks.

verified_endpoints.GET /api/story-video-studio/styles: PASS - Returns 6 video styles (storybook, comic, watercolor, cinematic, anime, 3d_cartoon)
verified_endpoints.GET /api/story-video-studio/pricing: PASS - Returns 5 credit costs: scene_generation(5), image_per_scene(10), voice_per_minute(10), video_render(20), watermark_removal(15)
verified_endpoints.POST /api/story-video-studio/projects/cr: PASS - Creates new project, validates story length and copyright
verified_endpoints.GET /api/story-video-studio/projects/{id: PASS - Returns prompt pack with character_bible, scene_prompts, voice_scripts
verified_endpoints.GET /api/story-video-studio/generation/v: PASS - Returns voice config with PREPAID_ONLY mode and 6 voices
verified_endpoints.GET /api/story-video-studio/generation/m: PASS - Returns 5 Pixabay tracks with categories

verified_frontend_elements.8_step_progress_bar: PASS - Header shows 8 step indicators: Story, Scenes, Characters, Prompts, Images, Voice, Music, Video
verified_frontend_elements.4_credit_pricing_cards: PASS - Displays Scene Generation(5), Per Image(10), Voice/Minute(10), Video Render(20)
verified_frontend_elements.6_video_styles: PASS - Storybook Animation, Comic Adventure, Soft Watercolor, Cinematic Fantasy, Anime Style, 3D Cartoon
verified_frontend_elements.form_elements: PASS - Title input, Story textarea, Language dropdown, Age Group dropdown
verified_frontend_elements.file_upload: PASS - Upload TXT, PDF, or DOCX option available
